title: popowia ferruginea
intro: Popowia ferruginea is a species of plant in the family Annonaceae, commonly known as the 'Ironwood' due to its reddish-brown bark. The medicinal properties of Popowia ferruginea lie in its anti-inflammatory, antimicrobial, and antioxidant properties, which are known to help in the treatment of various health issues. The health benefits of this plant include the relief from pain, fever reduction, and the improvement of immune system function. The herbal preparations of Popowia ferruginea include tea, extracts, and tinctures, which can be used to alleviate various health conditions.
